title: Da Bomb
description: A mod that adds more explosives
body:
Ever thought "Minecraft needs more explosives"? Well this mod is Da Bomb and adds more explosives to the world of Minecraft.
These bombs can be used for mining, getting rid of water, placing liquids and more.

The current list of bombs:
  • Bomb - A regular throwable explosive
  • Bouncy Bomb - A bouncier version of the Bomb
  • Sticky Bomb - A sticky version of the Bomb, sticking to any surface you throw it at (and mobs)
  • Dirt Bomb - An explosive that places dirt wherever it can without destroying existing blocks unless replace-able (like grass)
  • Dry Bomb - An explosive that gets rid of any fluid in it's explosion radius
  • Water Bomb - An explosive that places water in any non-solid block in it's explosion radius
  • Lava Bomb - An explosive that places lava in any non-solid block in it's explosion radius
  • Dynamite - An improved throwable explosive (Bigger radius than a regular bomb)
  • Bouncy Dynamite - A bouncier version of Dynamite
  • Sticky Dynamite - A sticky version of Dynamite, sticking to any surface you throw it at (and mobs)
  • Fish Bomb - Similar to the Bomb but slightly stronger and sticks to surfaces / mobs
  • Bee Bomb - An explosive that spawns angry bees
  • C4 and Detonator - An explosive which can be stuck to surfaces / mobs and detonated using the detonator
  • Flower Bomb - An explosive that places random flowers in it's explosion radius
  • Ender Bomb - An explosive that teleports any mob in the explosion radius to a random location within 64 blocks

  -Mrbysco
